summary: Completed testing of favor card optimization, 4-color theme, and email verification integration. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features working - login, home screen, favor cards, filters, detail page, and registration flow.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - React Native Web warning (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Home screen renders with 'Ciao, App!' greeting after login
✅ Favor cards display compact layout: avatar, title, description, category badge, type badge, granelli cost
✅ Filter buttons (Tutti/Offerte/Richieste) work correctly - visually active state changes
✅ Category filter chips (Trasporto, Spesa, etc.) work - filters favor list accordingly
✅ Registration flow shows onboarding carousel then verification step UI ready
✅ POST /api/auth/verify-email endpoint returns 404 for invalid user, 400 for wrong code
✅ POST /api/auth/resend-code endpoint returns 404 for invalid user, 200 on success
✅ POST /api/auth/login works with test credentials (reviewer@test.com / review123)
✅ Favor detail page loads without crash - shows status, type, category, granelli, duration, creator
✅ 4-color theme applied: Verde Bosco (#2D5A3D), Arancio Caldo (#E07B39), Oro (#FFD700), Bianco (#FFFFFF)
✅ Debt highlighting working - orange border on cards from users in debt
✅ Diventa Sostenitore promo banner visible on home screen
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working. Email verification via Resend is in TEST MODE - only sends to owner email (governaleguido92@gmail.com), but verification codes are stored in MongoDB and verify-email endpoint works correctly. Registration flow shows onboarding slides before form. Home screen shows compact favor cards with all elements (avatar, title, description, category, type badge, granelli). Filters work. Favor detail page loads correctly with ReportModal import fixed. 4-color theme (Verde Bosco, Arancio Caldo, Oro, Bianco) is applied throughout.

POST /api/auth/login.response: Returns user object and JWT token

POST /api/auth/register.response: Returns {requiresVerification: true, userId: string, message: string}

POST /api/auth/verify-email.response: Returns AuthResponse on valid code, 404/400 on errors

GET /api/favors.response: Returns filtered favor list with type, category filters

ui_verification.login_page: Working - email/password inputs, Accedi button, Google/Apple OAuth buttons
ui_verification.home_screen: Working - greeting, filters, category chips, favor cards list, bottom nav
ui_verification.favor_cards: Compact layout with avatar, title (1 line), description (1 line), category badge, type badge, granelli
ui_verification.filter_buttons: Tutti/Offerte/Richieste - visual active state, filters content
ui_verification.category_chips: Horizontal scroll, selectable, filters favors by category
ui_verification.favor_detail_page: Loads correctly with all info (status, type, category, granelli, duration, creator)
ui_verification.registration_flow: Onboarding slides -> form with all fields -> email verification step UI

resend_email_note: RESEND API IN TEST MODE - Emails only sent to owner address. Verification codes logged in backend for testing.
